title: StreakState
description: Current and longest streak for a single habit. Provided by Module 8 (Habits) to Social and Inbox. CROSS-USER-SAFE PROJECTION: contains NO monetary value, account name, merchant, or source reference (FR-SOC-001). A streak advances ONLY for a real, completed, non-reversed financial action keyed on a source event id (FR-HAB-001); advances are idempotent and compensated on reversal. This module computes no money.

action_class.description: The real-action class this habit is tied to. A habit can never be tied to a non-real action (app-open, view).

current_streak.description: Current consecutive-period streak length. 0 after a reset beyond the grace window.

longest_streak.description: Longest streak ever achieved; MUST be >= current_streak.

last_qualified_on.description: Local-day of the last qualifying real action; null if never qualified.

in_grace.description: Derived: within the grace window after the local-day boundary, so the streak is not yet considered broken.

freshness.description: Depends on freshness-stamped consumed completion events; stale ⇒ streak context flagged, never presented as fresh.
